input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.7.1
            TITLE: grounding is required for:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.7.1: Grounding is required for:
EV.6.7.1 Grounding is required for: 
a. Parts of the vehicle which are 100 mm or less from any Tractive System component 
b. The Tractive System Firewall T.1.9

final_answer: rule EV.6.7.1: Grounding is required for: EV.6.7.1 Grounding is required for: a. Parts of the vehicle which are 100 mm or less from any Tractive System component b. The Tractive System Firewall
